opinion: Climate change is an extinction-level threat; anyone opposing aggressive green reform should be considered an enemy of humanity and treated as such.
Humanity needs an immediate, mandatory ban on the use and sale of all fossil fuels, coupled with a full transition to renewable energy infrastructure.
World governments should implement a large-scale carbon tax that renders gas-powered travel economically unviable, ensuring a gradual transition to renewable energy sources.
Governments should incentivize electric vehicles and renewable energy infrastructure without penalizing the use of gasoline and coal.

Governments should maintain a diversified energy portfolio that includes renewables alongside sources such as natural gas and nuclear power, recognizing their continued use as developing countries expand energy access.

Leaders should reduce regulations on untapped oil reserves in the arctic circle to improve energy independence and pass free trade agreements with oil rich countries to make it more feasible to consumers.
Governments should stop all "green" spending immediately because climate change is a hoax and global warming is cyclical and natural.
Any "green" mandates should be criminalized because environmental regulations are an illegal infringement on property.
Anyone who believes in climate change and green policies is a mentally-challenged idiot who should be ignored or ridiculed without mercy.
